name: @repo/prism-sweep-transition
description: A persistent WebGL prism sweep transition wrapper for route and state changes.

useCases: Celebrate a successful publish or submit flow
Punctuate major route changes with a shader-inspired liquid sweep
Wrap demos, previews, or onboarding steps with a premium liquid state transition
compositionHints: Trigger sparingly for meaningful state changes, not every hover or click
Pair with cards, dashboards, or confirmation screens where the new state appears under the sweep
